[점검 단계 1]
 - 실행 명령어: if ls /proc/net/bonding/* >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  for b in /proc/net/bonding/*; do
    echo "===== $(basename "$b") ====="
    cat "$b"
  done
else
  echo "NIC BONDING NOT CONFIGURED"
fi
